Container.Name: poptonium
Container.Overview: Companion backend for the Poptonium Plex client. Caches ratings from mdblist, builds the Discover "popular" feed, proxies Overseerr requests, serves user-defined custom Library sections, and can search/download subtitles from OpenSubtitles. Includes a web admin UI at /admin to view caches, scheduled jobs and config, and create/order custom sections. Plex is required; mdblist, Overseerr and OpenSubtitles are optional (leave their variables blank to disable).

Config.Name: WebUI / API Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web admin UI and API. Keep this at 8085: the app falls back to the Plex host on a hardcoded 8085 when no reverse proxy is in front of it.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent data: SQLite cache DB and custom sections.

Config.Name: MDBLIST_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. mdblist.com API key: the source for all ratings (IMDb/RT/TMDB/Metacritic/MDbList) plus the Discover feed. Blank disables ratings and the popular feed; the rest still works.

Config.Name: OVERSEERR_URL
Config.Description: Optional. Overseerr base URL (e.g. http://overseerr:5055) for request/search proxy.

Config.Name: OVERSEERR_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. Overseerr API key. Blank disables the Overseerr proxy.

Config.Name: OPENSUBTITLES_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. OpenSubtitles app API key (opensubtitles.com, Profile, API Consumers). Required for online subtitle search/download.

Config.Name: OPENSUBTITLES_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional. OpenSubtitles account username; its daily download quota (20/day free) is used for downloads.
